notes.post_text:
Here it is:

The Arizona Senate audit confirms, beyond a shadow of a doubt, that Trump is the legitimate president of the 2020 presidential election.

Katie Hobbs inserted 74,243 mail-in ballots in the November 3, 2020 election that are tied to individuals and were returned and https://t.co/4q10ETqIEZ
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated this False. Officials say the claim stems from confusion over the early voting process and a misuse of Maricopa County documents. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2021/jul/19/donald-trump/no-evidence-74000-ariz-mail-ballots-cast-2020-elec/

notes.post_text: Do your part and report him to the @FBI and @NFL , illegal streaming is NOT ok and it is SHAMEFUL that a senatorial candidate would brazenly admit to this crime. https://t.co/6pT7AOU6pJ
notes.note_text: Per the linked 2013 post by @jamestalarico, his sister was video-calling him via Skype from her iPad to share the game on his laptop—a personal call between family members, not a public broadcast or commercial stream. https://x.com/jamestalarico/status/373961741819846656

notes.post_text: In Texas Senate race, Ken Paxton falsely claims James Talarico is a vegan  https://t.co/TwxC0NWR4r
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated this False. Talarico denies being vegan and recent campaign posts show him eating egg and cheese tacos, chicken, steak, and a turkey leg. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2026/may/27/ken-paxton/in-texas-senate-race-ken-paxton-falsely-claims-jam/

notes.post_text:
Never forget…

The Biden Administration did not let Elon use SpaceX to save astronauts who had been stranded for 9 months before the 2024 election because it could possibly help Trump politically.

Think about that.

Human beings stranded in space.

That’s the Left.
notes.note_text: PolitiFact rated a related claim False. NASA stated the astronauts were delayed due to Starliner safety issues and would return after a SpaceX crew arrived. https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2025/jan/08/facebook-posts/no-elon-musk-didnt-say-the-boeing-starliner-astron/

notes.post_text:
What the hell is he eating?

It’s not BBQ—because Talarico is passionately anti-meat.

Is that a tofu log? https://t.co/J9Uvch1RY7
notes.note_text: AFP Fact Check rated false the claim that James Talarico is vegan. Talarico has publicly stated he is vegetarian, not vegan, and is not "anti-meat" in the absolute sense implied. https://factcheck.afp.com/doc.afp.com.B4427KG

notes.post_text:
James Talarico wants to make our border a “welcome mat” for illegals—his words! He believes there are 6 genders and wants trans surgeries for kids. 

He’s a far-left radical with no business in the Senate.
notes.note_text: AFP Fact Check rated this Misleading. The clip of Talarico saying the border should be a "welcome mat" was deceptively edited; in full context he was describing what he opposes, not what he supports. https://factcheck.afp.com/doc.afp.com.A23T99E
